name: arcine
effect: Deal 4 damage. This ability cannot be used while you are engaged.

check-effects.effect: Deal an additional 12 damage. All damage dealt by this ability is piercing damage.

flavor-text: The pride of the Order of the Sun, the arcine is an arcane rifle unrivalled in power and precision. While they're a rare sight on the battlefield due to their excessive production costs, a shot from one of these can go straight through an imperial tank.
